title: GameEnhanced
description: A modpack that enhance the game with more things!
body:
It's... similiar to the other modpacks that I did.
Yeah, I am perfectionist.
Which is bad...

I SWEAR THIS IS GOING TO BE THE LAST ONE!!
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Anyway, this time there's more "fun" and actual things that me and most of the community want. (sure, something cannot be added to vanilla Minecraft since it doesn't feel "minecrafty").

I recommend to put at least 4-8 GBs of RAM into the modpack.


Basically:
- Combat update with the combat test snapshot 8c!
- Faster minecarts!
- The Aether!
- Bundles, which are a bit different from the vanilla one, but this is 1.21.1, so...
- The Warden, as always, is still OP.
- But hey! More archeology stuff!
- PROBABLY this won't boot the performance well...
- I mean, I've got some spike lags at the start, but after some time they disappear...
- And more things...


As always, credits to the modders and resource-packers!
They made the hard work.

Have fun!
